violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor of walk in freezer. -Observed boxes of food on floor of pantry.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape on handles of refrigerator in food prep area. Duct tape is not a cleanable material.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
